ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accrediting agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the accrediting agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the agency */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the agency */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the agency */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the agency */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agency */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the agency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the agency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the agency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_types" (
  "agency_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency type */,
  "agency_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agency type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_programs" (
  "agency_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency program */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accrediting agency */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_programs_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accrediting agency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program director */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the program director */,
  "director_email" TEXT /* Email address of the program director */,
  "director_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the program director */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the director was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the director was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_directors_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., Accreditation Reaffirmed, Probation, Renewal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the action was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "justifications" (
  "justification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each justification */,
  "justification_description" TEXT /* Description of the justification */,
  "justification_other" TEXT /* Additional notes or other justifications */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the justification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the justification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("justification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accreditation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation history entry */,
  "dapip_id" INTEGER /* Dapip ID for the accreditation action */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accrediting agency */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action taken */,
  "justification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the justification */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the accreditation action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the accreditation action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the accreditation history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the accreditation history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_history_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_history_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_history_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_history_justification_id FOREIGN KEY ("justification_id") REFERENCES justifications ("justification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, agency representative, program director) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "history_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accreditation history entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("history_id") REFERENCES accreditation_history ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accrediting agency */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the contact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_contacts_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)
